title: Laboratory of Biostatistics, Clinical Epidemiology, Public Health & AI
text:
Welcome to the digital home of the Laboratory of Biostatistics, Clinical Epidemiology, Public Health & AI.
This platform focuses on: - Biostatistics - Clinical epidemiology - Public health research - Bayesian and spatiotemporal modeling - Artificial intelligence in health - Reproducible research using R and Quarto



The long-term vision is to establish an advanced research and training laboratory at Ambo University, Ethiopia, supporting: - students, - researchers, - clinicians, - and public health professionals.




Bayesian statistics
Spatial epidemiology
Machine learning in healthcare
Malaria burden modeling
Maternal and child health
Public health AI
Clinical prediction modeling
